hero.title: Monolithic construction
hero.sub: For 17 years working with developers, government and large business. From the Armenian NPP to premium residential complexes.

numbers.heading: A scale that speaks for itself

projects.headingLine2: where we carry out the monolithic works

tech.techNote: Our own fleet = independence from subcontractors and predictable timelines.
tech.qualitySub: Every monolithic structure passes three-level quality control — from geometry to compliance with international standards.

qualityItems.title: Structural precision
qualityItems.text: Monolith geometry within international standards tolerances

qualityItems.title: Geodetic monitoring
qualityItems.text: Laser measurements and total-station surveys on every floor

qualityItems.title: Internal engineering supervision
qualityItems.text: In-house engineers on every site — independent verification

safety.title: SAFETY IS OUR TOP PRIORITY
safety.imageAlt: ЗУС защитные сетки на объекте Гюрджян Каскад
safety.block1Text1: The catch-and-arrest net is designed to stop people and objects falling from a height of 6–10 meters, preventing injuries on the construction site and the adjacent area.
safety.block1Text2: The nets are installed around the entire perimeter of the building, providing an additional level of protection for both workers and the surrounding area.
safety.block2Text: The entire perimeter of each floor is enclosed with metal or wooden protective railings, preventing the risk of workers falling from height.

process.heading: A transparent process — from design to handover

steps.title: Project analysis
steps.text: We study the architectural and engineering design and assess the scope.

steps.title: Resource planning
steps.text: Schedule, team, materials and equipment tailored to your site.

steps.title: Construction
steps.text: Monolithic works with PERI formwork and DOKA systems.

steps.title: Quality control
steps.text: Checks at every stage — geometry, concrete, reinforcement.

steps.title: On-time or early handover
steps.text: Documentation and handover of the finished monolith to the client.

meta.title: PROFMONOLITH — Monolithic construction for Armenia's leaders
meta.description: Monolithic construction in Armenia since 2008. 350,000+ m² delivered, 0 accidents. Contractor for developers, government and large business. Estimate in 24 hours.
